message:
fix(lab): prevent u32 overflow in obligation balance computation

Use saturating_add instead of plain addition in:
- capture_obligation_balance: committed + aborted could overflow
- ObligationBalanceRecord::recompute: committed + aborted + leaked could overflow

Found during fresh-eyes audit batch 403 of dual_run.rs (6645L).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
